description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant neon green exterior. The can features bold, glowing white text and a stylized silhouette of a puma at the bottom, giving it a modern and energetic appearance. The main label includes large, prominent letters and a slogan, while one side displays a block of repeated, nonsensical text in white. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab, and a barcode is visible on the back. The surface appears smooth and slightly reflective, with no visible condensation. The overall design is sleek and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments.
description: A tall, neon green aluminum beer can with glowing white text, a puma silhouette, and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the glowing 'PUMA X' text, slogan, and puma silhouette on a neon green background.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a block of repeated white text and a barcode near the base.
description_view_2: This angle shows the edge of the main label and part of the repeated text, with the puma silhouette partially visible.
description_view_3: The main label with 'PUMA X', slogan, and full puma silhouette is clearly visible on the neon green background.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a neon green background with glowing white text, a stylized puma silhouette, and a block of repeated white text. The design is modern, energetic, and visually striking, with a focus on bold typography and minimalistic imagery.
